segments.text: Namaste sir, can you hear me?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay sir, should I speak in Hindi?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, fine sir. Sir, I am Dr. Farana. I want to do a video verification for your Tata AI policy. In this, I will ask verification and medical history questions. This call will be recorded for quality and audit purposes. And this will take 5 to 10 minutes to complete this call.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Please kindly note that your responses and replies regarding your health and habits will become part of your insurance policy. And if this proposal form is accepted, it will become a legal document between you and Tata AI. So, if there is any incorrect answer or response, there are chances of the policy being cancelled before or after issuance. Later on, there are also chances of rejection at the time of claiming. So, I request you to answer my questions completely and correctly, okay?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: And during this call, you should not look elsewhere; you only have to look at the camera and talk, and no one else should assist you from behind, okay?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: To start, please state your name and date of birth.
